description: Top layer thickness: Half-level 0 sits at the model top (0.0 hPa, ~∞ m), but the topmost resolved layer is bounded by half-levels 0 and 1. Using geometric altitudes, the top of layer 1 is at 80,301.65 m and the top of layer 2 is at 74,584.91 m, giving a top-layer thickness of ~5,717 m.
